1999June 7, 1999

🇳🇴 Lillehammer, Norway

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Lillehammer, Norway, June 7, 1999 -- June 17, 1999

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1999-06-lillehammer-norway

17 Resolutions

419Plenary
Direct WG 11 on PDML and accept collaboration on XML representation
SC4 directs WG 11 to take into account the technical aspects of PDML within its work for the XML representation of EXPRESS-driven data, specifically in the development of a specification for an ear...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
418Plenary
Remove Parts 221 and 106 from ISO 10303 Release 2
SC4 decides to remove Part 221 and its associated Abstract Test Suites as well as Part 106 from the list of parts planned for Release 2 of ISO 10303.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
417Plenary
Invite participants for product structure requirements synthesis to WG 10 workshop
SC4 invites interested parties in the collection and synthesis of the requirements for product structure to participate in the WG 10 workshop on STEP Modularization in September 1999. Participants ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
416Plenary
Invite WG 12 to lead ad hoc group for enterprise information integration
SC4 invites its WG 12 to lead an ad hoc group to deliver the SC4 information requirements into the BSR activity and the proposed MoU/MG summit, and participate in the construction of a global synth...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
413Plenary
Appoint Thomas Warren as Convenor of Quality Committee
SC4 approves the appointment of Thomas Warren as Convenor of the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
412Plenary
Approve PWI for Process Specification Language
Subject to discussions with other interested groups in ISO/TC 184, SC4 approves acceptance of the PWI proposal (SC4 N875) entitled 'Process Specification Language', and directs the Secretariat to t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
411Plenary
Modify SC 4 organizational handbook to reference resolution papers template
SC4 instructs its secretariat to modify the SC4 organizational handbook to include a reference to the resolution papers template as documented in SC4N864.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
410Plenary
Modify SC 4 organizational handbook to include ISO time limits
SC4 instructs its secretariat to modify the SC4 organizational handbook to include the ISO time limits for project deliverables and requirements for handling project slippage as documented in SC4N863.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
409Plenary
Modify SC 4 organizational handbook for minor changes procedures
SC4 instructs its secretariat to modify the SC4 organizational handbook to reflect new procedures for incorporating minor changes to standards and standing documents as documented in SC4N862.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
408Plenary
Accept amendments to SC 4 Organization Handbook and circulate Quality Manual
SC4 resolves to accept the amendments to the SC4 Organization Handbook as defined in SC4 QC N111, with immediate effect.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
407Plenary
Request waiver of FDIS vote for SC 4 standards under specific conditions
SC4 request its Secretariat to ask ISO-Central Secretariat for a waiver of the FDIS vote for SC4 standards subject to the following conditions: After completion of the DIS balloting, the SC4 Chairm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
406Plenary
Approve Category A liaison with PIEBASE and appoint Alan Doniger
SC4 approves a Category A active two-way liaison with the PIEBASE, approves Mr. Alan Doniger as the person to actively liaise to PIEBASE on SC4's behalf, and requests that the SC4 Secretary confirm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
405Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for ISO 10303 projects
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |10303-35 |Lothar Klein | |10303-41 ed 2 |Pascal ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to express its thanks to Allison Barnard Feeney for her leadership of the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Quality Committee and her contributions to the implementation of the new quality process for the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to express its thanks to Lisa Phillips for her efforts as Secretary of the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 organisation from 1997-9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
On the occasion of his last meeting, SC4 recognizes the contribution of Rainer Glatz to the work of the Subcommittee since its inception in July 1984.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 wishes to thank Knut Lindelien, NTS, and his tireless support staff: Bjørnhild Sæterøy, Hans Backer, Ulf Leirstein, Ann-Kristin Nilsen, Camilla Svendsen, for their quality services and generous...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
